DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100181360) AS TO DEFENDANT THE HOME DEPOT, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING THAT IS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHUMAN: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: - CONSENT JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Precilia Balabbo's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed, and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schuman: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
